title: Freshly Creepers
description: Gives creepers a trailer-inspired design compatible with fresh animations.
body:
## Freshly Creepers by Eianex
This resource pack gives creepers a trailer-inspired design, providing a high-quality texture that is compatible with Fresh Animations. Perfect for players who appreciate smooth aesthetics.

It is a personal project, inspired by various existing packs. It combines the best ideas from Hellays Overhualed Creepers, Camo Creepers, and Creepers Reimagined into a fresh, new texture.

- Correct Order:
![Order with Fresh Animations](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d90cdb07a2957d0df56c9edc75fa7184cda05184_0.webp)

## FAQ

### What does this pack do?
This pack modifies the texture of the creeper.

### What versions does it support?
It supports nearly all versions. However, for versions below 1.20, the game might indicate that it is intended for newer versions.

### Does it require any additional mods or resource packs?
No, not if you are using the normal version. For compatibility with Fresh Animations, you will need the Fresh Animations resource pack. Additionally, I recommend using ETF and EFM on Sodium.

### Can I modify this pack?
Yes, you can. If you want to publish or showcase it, please provide a link to the original pack.
